title: ASML Q4 and full-year 2024 results
note: Tightest pair in the set: a 4-page press release expanded into a 25-slide investor deck. Tests whether the pipeline expands a dense source rather than compressing it.
licence: (c) ASML, all rights reserved. Freely downloadable IR material; used locally for evaluation only, never redistributed.
expectedCharacteristics: States Q4 net sales and full-year total net sales with the gross margin percentage
Includes a bookings/backlog slide -- the figure the market actually reacts to
Carries forward the published 2025 guidance range rather than inventing one
